text:
Author: jgh
Date: Tue Apr 16 22:05:34 2013
New Revision: 315912
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/315912

Log:
  - update to 1.6.1
  
  Coming from 1.5.1, this brings many new features, improvements and bugfixes.
  Some more interesting are
  
  - adding support for GeoTIFF
  - add a PostGIS writer
  - new csv driver with an automatic mode
  
  A suitable PostGIS driver has to be manually installed from the OpenJUMP plugins pages,
  because there are many different PostGIS versions around.
  
  PR:		177850
  Submitted by:	maintainer, rhurlin@gwdg.de
  
  Feature safe:	yes

Modified:
  head/graphics/openjump/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/graphics/openjump/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/graphics/openjump/files/patch-bin__oj_linux.sh   (contents, props changed)
  head/graphics/openjump/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

-PORTVERSION=	1.5.1

 	@${ECHO_CMD} "---> Installing JAR files"

+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>

+post-install:
